name: muninn-kernel-ts
description: Transport-agnostic microkernel for in-memory Muninn frame routing in TypeScript
author: Ian Zepp

scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs').then(({ rmSync }) => rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.test: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist/**/*_test.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test --experimental-test-coverage dist/**/*_test.js
